title: mollugo ulei
intro: Mollugo ulei is a species of flowering plant in the family Molluginaceae, commonly known as the small-flowered carpetweed. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Mollugo ulei is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
